nasb.text: But if you will not obey these words, I swear by Myself,” declares the Lord, “that this house will become a desolation.” ’ ”

esv.text: But if you will not obey these words, I swear by myself, declares the Lord, that this house shall become a desolation.

cnv.text: 如果你們不聽從這些話，我指著自己起誓，這宮殿必變為廢墟。’”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 但如果你们不遵守我的命令，我凭自己起誓，这王宫必沦为废墟。这是耶和华说的。’”
